content: Implement T-20: Create the main Quarto template (.qmd) for the HTML dashboard
Implement T-21: Implement the data gathering logic for sv_report() to feed the dashboard
Implement T-22: Add a pre-flight check to sv_report() to ensure Quarto/Pandoc are available
Implement T-23: Design and implement the Parity Matrix and Error Details tabs
Implement T-24: Design and implement the Performance Trends tab
Implement T-25: Add a Spec Coverage widget to the dashboard
